title: Bellamy Mocks the Dreamers
description: Luffy and Zoro refuse to fight back when Bellamy’s crew humiliates them, choosing their convictions over a pointless brawl.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Bellamy, Nami, Sarquiss, Mock Town pirate, Luffy. Luffy and Zoro refuse to fight back when Bellamy’s crew humiliates them, choosing their convictions over a pointless brawl.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There was this weird guy just now,

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Who was offering some free apples,

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: But when people bit into them...

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: The whole store's a bloody mess now!

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: If he picked the wrong one,

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: He would've died on the first bite...

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: How many people does that make now?

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Just who the hell is he...?

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Best not to get involved with him...

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: What're you gettin' riled up for!?

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: It's like a floating ocean resort...

summary: Luffy and Zoro refuse to fight back when Bellamy’s crew humiliates them, choosing their convictions over a pointless brawl.
